text.title: Sprint Capacity From Complexity Tags Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: PM converts slots back to hours in roadmap; estimate failure mode returns.
antipattern.fix: Block hours in capacity model output via schema.

antipattern.symptom: Weights from 6 months ago; planning mispredicts by 40%.
